title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Close margins, shifting alliances define Kunnathunadu outcome
description: From a four-cornered contest in 2021, the battle has now sharpened into a more intense three-way fight. It is a rematch between sitting MLA P.V. Sreenijin of the Communist Party of India (Marxist) and Congress’ V.P. Sajeendran, with Twenty20 candidate Babu Divakaran completing the field
